slides.title: Quarterly revenue progression
slides.subtitle: Illustrative revenue trend over the last four quarters

slides.title: Risk lens
slides.body: The next quarter depends on disciplined execution in go-to-market productivity and infrastructure resilience.
bullets: Hiring pace must stay aligned to actual productivity gains.
Platform resilience remains a board-level confidence topic.
Capital allocation should continue to favor compounding bets.

slides.title: Operating trade-off
slides.subtitle: Board discipline requires seeing both the cost of drift and the benefit of focus

comparison_columns.title: If execution drifts
comparison_columns.body: The company absorbs more operational noise and slower learning cycles.
bullets: Resilience issues remain visible for too long

comparison_columns.title: If execution stays disciplined
comparison_columns.body: Leadership compounds confidence through clearer prioritization and better operating leverage.
bullets: Capital stays aligned to compounding bets

slides.title: Board takeaway
slides.quote: The company is in a stronger position when performance discipline and strategic clarity move together.
